chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.S- 373 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 21.10.2025. Mr. Haider Ali Maheri, Advocate for respondents. = Mr. Muhammad Moazziz Taha Khan, Advocate states that his name has wrongly been mentioned in the cause list as he has no concern with this case and requests that his name may be deleted. Order accordingly. It appears from the perusal of the orders passed by this Court that counsel for the petitioners last appeared in this matter on 20.05.2025 thereafter, none were present on his behalf and no intimation was received on the subsequent dates primarily 12.08.2025, 09.09.2025, 26.09.2025 and today. It appears that the petitioners have lost their interest in pursuing this Lis. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Tufail
